title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 151.340 - Penalties imposed on certain officers
text:
151.340.  Penalties imposed on certain officers. — If any commissioner or clerk of any county commission, collector or any member of the state tax commission, shall fail to discharge the duties imposed upon him under this chapter, in the manner and time required therein, he shall be liable to a fine of not less than one hundred nor more than five hundred dollars, to be recovered by civil action in any court of competent jurisdiction.
(RSMo 1939 § 11277, A.L. 1945 p. 1825 § 34) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10047; 1919 § 13049; 1909 § 11601
